data.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md` — the dso:red-test-writer plugin agent definition.

YAML frontmatter:
- name: red-test-writer
- model: sonnet
- description: Writes behavioral RED tests for TDD workflows, rejecting change-detector patterns.
- tools: [Bash, Read, Glob, Grep, Write, Edit]

Prompt sections (per story guidance):
1. Role and Identity (~50 tokens)
2. Rejection Criteria Rubric (~300 tokens) — rubric-based, explicitly prohibits grepping source files
3. Prohibitions (~80 tokens)
4. Structured Failure Message Schema (~200 tokens) — matching contract doc
5. Pre-Flight Checklist (~150 tokens) — 4 questions before writing
6. Self-Review Instructions (~100 tokens) — apply rejection criteria post-write
7. Output Contract (~150 tokens) — two formats: TEST_RESULT:written and TEST_RESULT:rejected

Additional sections:
- DSO Test Infrastructure Context (assert.sh, git-fixtures.sh, naming conventions)
- Codebase Examples (GOOD/BAD patterns from existing tests)
- Test Quality Heuristics (H1-H10)

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md

## TDD Requirement
Depends on Task 1243-6bac (RED). After creating this file, RED tests must pass (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Agent file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md
- [ ] Agent has name=red-test-writer
  Verify: head -10 $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md | grep -q 'name: red-test-writer'
- [ ] Agent has model=sonnet
  Verify: head -10 $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md | grep -q 'model: sonnet'
- [ ] Agent contains change-detector prohibition language
  Verify: grep -qi 'grep.*source\|source.*file.*content\|change.detector' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md
- [ ] All RED tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh
